2606.10328.title: Content-Induced Spatial-Spectral Aggregation Network for Change Detection in Remote Sensing Images
2606.10328.paper_summary: The integration of spatial and spectral information is beneficial to the improvement of change detection performance. However, existing methods cannot efficiently suppress the influences of spatial and spectral differences in unchanged areas. To address these issues, in this paper we propose a content-guided spatial-spectral integration network (CSI-Net) for the fusion of global spatial details and spectral difference information. Specifically, the proposed CSI-Net is composed of a spatial reasoning (SR) module, a spectral difference (SD) module, and a content-guided integration (CGI) module. In the SR module, the spatial information is learned by cascaded graph convolution blocks for global modeling. The SD module is responsible for the extraction of spectral features, by calculating the means and variances of features to reduce the impact of spectral differences in unchanged regions. In addition, in order to integrate the spatial-spectral features efficiently, we design a CGI module to further take advantage of their complementary information. In this module, high-level content information is introduced as a guide for a proper interaction. Due to the efficient spatial-spectral fusion, the proposed CSI-Net can learn the changed features better while achieving a suppression of spectral differences. Experimental results on LEVIR-CD, WHU-CD, and CLCD datasets demonstrate that the proposed CSI-Net produces better performance compared to state-of-the-art methods, and is applicable to different scenarios
2606.10328.paper_summary_zh: 空間和光譜信息的整合有助於提高變化檢測的性能。<lb/>然而，現有的方法無法有效抑制在未變化區域中空間和光譜差異的影響。<lb/>為了解決這些問題，本文提出了一種內容引導的空間-光譜整合網絡（CSI-Net），用於全球空間細節和光譜差異信息的融合。<lb/>具體而言，所提出的CSI-Net由一個空間推理（SR）模塊、一個光譜差異（SD）模塊和一個內容引導整合（CGI）模塊組成。<lb/>在SR模塊中，通過級聯圖卷積塊學習空間信息以進行全局建模。<lb/>SD模塊負責提取光譜特徵，通過計算特徵的均值和方差來減少在未變化區域中光譜差異的影響。<lb/>此外，為了有效整合空間-光譜特徵，我們設計了一個CGI模塊，以進一步利用它們的互補信息。<lb/>在此模塊中，引入高級內容信息作為適當交互的指導。<lb/>由於高效的空間-光譜融合，所提出的CSI-Net能夠更好地學習變化特徵，同時抑制光譜差異。<lb/>在LEVIR-CD、WHU-CD和CLCD數據集上的實驗結果表明，所提出的CSI-Net相比於最先進的方法產生了更好的性能，並且適用於不同場景。
2606.10328.author: Yunlong Liu et.al.
